description: Junior Back-End Developer (PHP Laravel) Type: Permanent Work Mode: Hybrid Work Days: Monday – Friday Work Hours: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Location: Maluri, Sunway Velocity Project: Personal Financing & Loan Salary: RM4,500 – RM6,000 (depending on seniority) Job Description We are looking for a Junior Back-End Developer with hands-on experience in PHP Laravel to join our IT team. You will work on projects involving personal loan systems and other in-house platforms, ensuring efficiency, performance, and seamless integration. Key Responsibilities: Develop and maintain backend features using PHP Laravel. Optimise SQL queries to improve system performance. Design and implement RESTful APIs for frontend and third-party integrations. Participate in projects such as in-house chat applications, finance & accounting systems, data integrations, and external API connections. Stay proactive in learning new skills and technologies to enhance project delivery. Requirements Minimum Diploma in Software Engineering, Computer Science, Information Technology or other related fields. At least 1 year of hands-on experience in PHP Laravel backend development is preferred. Proficiency in MySQL, with experience in writing complex queries and performance tuning. Familiar with Git/GitHub and version control best practices. Knowledge of Node.js or Python. Familiarity with MongoDB or other NoSQL databases. Experience in building AI chatbot applications or integrating external APIs is an advantage. Company Benefits Accessible Location: Office within walking distance from MRT. Performance Bonus: Monthly bonuses up to 4 digits based on performance. Professional Development: Sponsorship for training and workshops. Leave Encashment: Get paid for unused annual leave. Team Culture: Monthly team bonding activities based on your preference. Tools Provided: All necessary work equipment and resources supplied. If you are passionate about backend development and eager to work in a dynamic environment, we’d love to hear from you.
